name: Tabs
structurePatterns: Line: horizontal flex row with bottom border, active item has 2px primary underline
Card: items with top-rounded border, active card merges into content area with inset top shadow
Capsule: rounded container with pill-shaped active highlight using primary bg
Button: bordered container with items getting elevated bg when active
Othertabs: subtle gray container with slightly elevated active item
Vertical: column layout with left border indicator on active item
Scrollable line variant wraps tabs with left/right arrow buttons
usageHints: Line tab active: color #1664FF, font-weight 500, 2px underline
Line tab sizes: lg=36px height/14px font, md=32px/13px, sm=28px/13px
Card active: white bg, inset top 2px primary shadow, bottom border merges with content
Button active: bg #FFFFFF with subtle box-shadow
Vertical active: bg #F3F7FF, left 2px indicator height 16px
Badge component: min-width 16px, bg #F53F3F, white text, border-radius 8px

root.class: tabs-line | tabs-card | tabs-capsule | tabs-button | othertabs | tabs-vertical
